title: Six months ago I had no idea why I was losing trades. Now I have the data. Here's what it actually showed me.
author: TradeLeap
selftext:
Before I started logging properly: I had a rough sense that I traded worse on Fridays and that I overtrade after a big win. Nothing I could actually act on.



After 6 months of structured journaling with emotional state, confluences, and plan adherence tracked per trade:



\- My 'euphoric' trades have the worst RR of any emotional state. Not even close.

\- Two confluences I thought were strong have negative expectancy in my own data.

\- My plan adherence rate on Tuesday/Wednesday is 84%. Friday it's 51%.



None of this came from a coach or a course. It came from my own trade data, properly structured.



I built the app that generated these insights  -  it's called TradeLeap. Designed specifically for retail forex traders. Logs emotional state, confluences, plan adherence, PnL in RR/euros/percentage. The analytics layer interprets it automatically.



The dashboard is customisable so you can view your metrics however you actually think about your edge.



Currently 24 traders using it. The patterns people are finding in their own data are consistently surprising.



If you've been trading for more than 6 months without structured data on your own behavior, you're probably making the same mistakes in a loop without knowing it.



Would anyone here be interested in a breakdown of how to structure confluence tagging so the data is actually queryable later?

TradeLeap free on AppStore !

replies.author: TradeLeap
replies.body: Absolument pas, l’application est disponible sur AppStore et tout le contenue est 100% gratuit, je ne vois donc pas sur quoi vous vous basez pour dire ça 😁
